title: Eventron
description: A plugin that automates some events in your server for you and makes your server fun with random events!
body:
![eventron banner :/](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9d6b12ca72ba7d2a901d2512e3a6e6c1489de39.jpeg)

### WARNING!
Eventron has been discontinued, it will not get another public release, due to not being needed or even really working.

## Eventron!
**Eventron** is a plugin that does certain tasks automatically, BUT with that, it also does randomized fun events every X minutes/hours!

It has randomized events like a random player gets hit with lightning every 30 minutes, TNT gets spawned on a random player ever hour, a mob swarm every 3 hours, etc.

This plugin is useful if you want your server to be more fun with events!

### What platforms can Eventron be ran on?
Eventron can be ran on many similar platforms, this includes:
- Bukkit
- Spigot
- Paper
- Purpur
- _Pufferfish_ (not listed on Modrinth)
- _Leaf_ (not listed on Modrinth)
- Folia

### What game versions can Eventron be ran on?
Eventron can work on many versions and subversions, this includes:
- 1.21.x (has been tested)
- 1.20.x
- 1.19.x
- 1.18.x
- 1.17.x
- 1.16.x
- 1.15.x
- 1.14.x
- 1.13.x
- 1.12.x
- 1.11.x
- 1.10.x (has been tested)
- 1.9.x
- 1.8.x
- 1.7.x
